title: Frontend Batch 18 - Admin Mutation Guard and Fetch Failure Reinforcement
summary: Reinforced admin blog/work list mutation controls for rows without usable ids.
behaviorBugsFound: Admin blog rows with missing ids still exposed enabled selection controls.
Admin work rows with missing ids still exposed enabled selection controls.
Missing-id rows could reach mutation affordances even though no valid row id could be submitted safely.

validation.command: npx skills find react admin mutation testing error state
validation.notes: Mutation/admin skills found; no new skill installed.

validation.result: failed before fixes, passed after fixes

remainingGaps: Missing-id edit links route to the list page, but there is no explicit disabled edit affordance.
Admin mutation helper unit tests still focus on API behavior indirectly through component tests.
Admin dashboard collection cards remain read-only links and have no mutation controls to guard.
Dashboard partial failure messaging could be expanded separately.
recommendation: Proceed to Frontend Batch 19 - Admin Dashboard Partial Failure and Navigation Reinforcement.
